This word means ME! It's just one tall letter.
I want A apple. It's the very first letter!
This is the most common word in English! T-H-E.
The sky IS blue. I-S, two letters!
MY toy, MY book — it means it belongs to you! M-Y.
Look at IT! Just two letters: I-T.
The cup is ON the table. O-N!
Look UP at the sky! U-P.
Ready, set, GO! G-O, just two letters!
I SEE you! S-E-E, the E appears twice!
I CAN do it! C-A-N, three letters!
WE means you and me together! W-E.
HE is a boy. Just two letters: H-E!
SHE is a girl. S-H-E, three letters!
NO means stop! N-O, just two letters!
Sound it out: C says 'kuh', A says 'ah', T says 'tuh'. C-A-T!
Sound it out: D says 'duh', O says 'ah', G says 'guh'. D-O-G!
Sound it out: S says 'sss', U says 'uh', N says 'nnn'. S-U-N!
Sound it out: H says 'huh', A says 'ah', T says 'tuh'. H-A-T!
Sound it out: B says 'buh', E says 'eh', D says 'duh'. B-E-D!
Sound it out: P says 'puh', I says 'ih', G says 'guh'. P-I-G!
Sound it out: C says 'kuh', U says 'uh', P says 'puh'. C-U-P!
Sound it out: B says 'buh', U says 'uh', S says 'sss'. B-U-S!
Sound it out: F-R-O-G! The 'fr' sounds like 'frr'!
Sound it out: J-U-M-P! The 'mp' sounds like 'mmpuh'!
Sound it out: S-T-O-P! The 'st' sounds like 'sst'!
Sound it out: C-L-A-P! The 'cl' sounds like 'cll'!

Hot like fire — the opposite feels like ice!
Happy means smiling — the opposite means crying.
Up goes to the sky — the opposite goes to the ground!

This fruit has the same name as its color!

question: What sound does the letter B make?
